channel.title: How to deploy Frontity to Hostinger?
channel.description: I created my frontity applicaiton, now I need to delpoy it to live server. I have a subscription plan on hostinger, how can I deploy my website there?

item.title: How to deploy Frontity to Hostinger?
item.dc:creator: sv48321
item.description:
Hi , I ended up using Vercel for deployment; it’s good for the moment, but I’ll either upgrade my plan or switch to another hosting soon.

Read full topic
item.source: How to deploy Frontity to Hostinger?

item.title: How to deploy Frontity to Hostinger?
item.dc:creator: nicobava96
item.description:
Hi dude, try to use Layer0 to deploy Frontity.

Heroku and the otherone don’t work, and as a react application you need a virtual server to upload react. I tried to upload my site to hostinger shared hosting and couldn’t make it work, was really stressfull also.

Tell me how you go

Read full topic
item.source: How to deploy Frontity to Hostinger?
